summary: Comprehensive auth flow testing for Google OAuth redirect callback fix. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend auth flows verified: registration, login, terms acceptance, dashboard access, logout, ProtectedRoute redirect behavior, and OAuth callback handling.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthCallback component (App.js:71-132) correctly handles session_id from URL hash/query, exchanges for session_token via POST /api/auth/session, stores in localStorage, and navigates to /dashboard with user data in state
ProtectedRoute (App.js:138-207) correctly initializes isAuthenticated from location.state?.user to avoid unnecessary /auth/me calls after AuthCallback passes user data
AppRouter (App.js:210-387) correctly intercepts URLs with session_id in hash/search before rendering Routes, preventing ProtectedRoute from running until AuthCallback finishes
Backend auth endpoints (auth.py) correctly handle: POST /session (session_id exchange), GET /me (Bearer token auth), POST /logout (session invalidation)
auth_utils.py get_current_user correctly checks cookie, query param, and Authorization header for session_token
Frontend stores session_token in localStorage and sends via Authorization: Bearer header (not cookies) due to Kubernetes/Cloudflare proxy CORS restrictions

test_credentials.note: Test users created during testing with pattern test_auth_143_xxx@test.com, test_logout_xxx@test.com, test_state_xxx@test.com

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing for auth flow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow fix verified. Google OAuth redirect callback works correctly - AuthCallback intercepts /dashboard#session_id=xxx, exchanges session_id for session_token via POST /api/auth/session, stores token in localStorage, and navigates to /dashboard with user data in location.state. ProtectedRoute correctly uses location.state.user to avoid unnecessary /auth/me calls. Logout clears localStorage and redirects to landing page. All backend auth endpoints working correctly.

verified_features.registration_flow: PASS - Creates user, redirects to /dashboard, shows terms acceptance
verified_features.terms_acceptance: PASS - Checkbox and button work, calls POST /api/auth/accept-terms
verified_features.dashboard_access: PASS - Shows user info, cases section, navigation
verified_features.logout_flow: PASS - Clears localStorage, redirects to landing page
verified_features.protected_route_no_token: PASS - Redirects to / when no token in localStorage
verified_features.oauth_callback_invalid_session: PASS - Invalid session_id redirects to landing page after retry
verified_features.oauth_callback_url_interception: PASS - AppRouter intercepts #session_id= before Routes render
verified_features.backend_session_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/auth/session requires session_id, returns 401 for invalid
verified_features.backend_me_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/auth/me requires auth, returns user data with valid token
verified_features.backend_register_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/auth/register creates user with session
